tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent ~$106 est. Apr 27 (+0.6%); last confirmed $105.33 Apr 24 (TradingEconomics/CNBC). Round 2 Islamabad paused (Apr 25); Oman back-channel tentatively active (Araghchi-Sultan Haitham, Apr 26); deal 'inches away' per Araghchi. Trump 'shoot and kill' ROE for IRGC minelaying boats (Apr 23); Pentagon: mine-clearing ~6 months (PBS) - Hormuz physical reopening delayed even on deal. Tail (47%) + Stress (44%) = 91% continued disruption probability. Stop-loss: confirmed deal + mine clearance + P&I restoration (Brent sub-$92). Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent ~$106 est. Apr 27; ASEAN Energy Equities ~155.0 est. (+1.3%); ASEAN Banks ~170.8 est. (-0.5%). iTraxx Asia IG ~208bp (-2bp); ASEAN HY ~598bp (-2bp). Oman back-channel (Apr 26) gives fractional spread relief; tail risk 47% (down from 50%). ASEAN Energy long maintained; ASEAN Banks underweight at full size - spreads remain distressed at 208bp vs pre-crisis 106bp. Tail (47%) points to $130+ Brent and 230-260bp iTraxx. Conviction medium on both legs.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Hold on Talks Collapse
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~58.84 est. (-0.1% Apr 27; mild USD softening on Trump political uncertainty). Oman back-channel (Apr 26) opens narrow window; tail risk 47% (down from 50%) - USD Call/PHP Put 61.00 overlay slightly reduced in urgency. Blockade intact; Iran holds 3 Western vessels; full PHP recovery still capped. Stop-loss: confirmed full Hormuz reopening with P&I restoration below 58.00. Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Hold on Re-Escalation
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~17,183 est. (-0.1% Apr 27); Indonesia 10Y ~7.36% est. (+2bp). ICP overshoot ~$36/bbl at Brent ~$106 - fiscal pressure persists. Oman back-channel opens narrow window; tail risk 47%; IDR recovery still capped. Hold IDR short at half-size; USD Call/IDR Put 17,500 strike retains value. Stop-loss at USD/IDR 16,600 (confirmed Hormuz reopening). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Hold at 210bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~208bp (-2bp Apr 27 est.; Oman back-channel signal); ASEAN HY ~598bp (-2bp). Oman back-channel (Araghchi-Sultan Haitham, Apr 26) gives fractional spread relief; tail risk 47% (down from 50%). Pentagon: mine-clearing ~6 months even post-deal (PBS); full Hormuz commercial reopening delayed. Hold CDS protection; tail (47%) targets iTraxx 230-260bp; stress (44%) stabilises 200-220bp. Remove at confirmed deal + mine clearance + spreads below 175bp. Conviction medium.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold on Talks Collapse
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM ~$17.60 est. (+0.6% Apr 27; last confirmed $15.81 TradingEconomics Apr 21); TTF ~€44.86 est. Oman back-channel (Araghchi-Sultan Haitham, Apr 26) opens narrow window; Ras Laffan restart not before late Aug 2026; tail 47%. Pentagon: mine-clearing ~6 months even post-deal - Hormuz physical reopening delayed regardless of diplomacy. Hold JKM long; Oman signal reduces but does not eliminate tail. Stress target $18-22 JKM; tail target $26-30. Stop at confirmed mine clearance + P&I restoration. Conviction medium.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG ~208bp (-2bp Apr 27) - Oman back-channel (Apr 26) gives fractional relief but spreads remain distressed at 208bp vs pre-crisis 106bp. Execute any residual private placements. Tail (47%) still targets 230-260bp. Window remains narrow - physical Hormuz reopening delayed 6 months regardless of deal.

Brent ~$106 est. Apr 27 (+0.6%); THB ~34.07 est. (-0.1%); Thailand 10Y ~2.41% (+1bp). Oman back-channel (Apr 26) opens narrow window; tail risk 47%; PTTEP EBITDA strong at current oil prices. Execute USD H2 prefunding; window is narrowing. Gulf JV sanctions-compliance review urgent given Touska seizure precedent and GL U expiry Apr 19.

iTraxx Asia IG ~208bp (-2bp Apr 27); USD/SGD ~1.2947 (-0.1%); Brent ~$106 est. Oman back-channel (Apr 26) mildly positive - spreads fractionally tighter but remain elevated. Maintain full USD hedging; revolving-credit expansion window still narrowing. Tail (47%) targets spreads 230bp+; execute revolving-credit expansion without delay.

ASEAN HY ~598bp (-2bp Apr 27); Brent ~$106 est. Oman back-channel (Apr 26) gives fractional relief but Hyflux desalination power cost trajectory remains elevated. Advance private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring terms. Tail (47%) pushes ASEAN HY to 620-650bp.
